windows.command: if (Test-Path .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . .venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 } elseif (Test-Path ..\vui\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . ..\vui\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 } elseif (Test-Path venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1) { . venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 }; python server.py

tasks.label: 🚀 Run VOX Backend
tasks.command: cd ../vox && ( [ -x .venv/bin/python ] && exec .venv/bin/python server.py || exec python server.py )

windows.command: $voxRoot = (Resolve-Path ..\vox).Path; $venvRoot = Join-Path $voxRoot '.venv-win'; $py = Join-Path $venvRoot 'Scripts\python.exe'; if (Test-Path $py) { $maj = (& $py -c 'import sys; print(sys.version_info[0])'); $min = (& $py -c 'import sys; print(sys.version_info[1])'); if (("$maj.$min") -ne '3.12') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $venvRoot -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; if (!(Test-Path $py)) { py -3.12 -m venv $venvRoot }; $py = Join-Path $venvRoot 'Scripts\python.exe'; $needInstall = $true; if (Test-Path $py) { & $py -c 'import httpx, claude_agent_sdk' 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $needInstall = $false } }; if ($needInstall) { & $py -m pip install -U pip; & $py -m pip install -r (Join-Path $voxRoot 'requirements.txt'); & $py -m pip install claude-agent-sdk }; Set-Location $voxRoot; & $py server.py

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop Demo
tasks.command: PID=$(lsof -ti :5002 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then kill -9 $PID; fi; echo 'Cockpit (port 5002) stopped.'

windows.command: $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5002 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($p) { $p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Cockpit (port 5002) stopped.' } else { Write-Host 'No listener on port 5002.' }

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop Cockpit + VOX
tasks.command: for p in 5002 5001; do PID=$(lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then kill -9 $PID; fi; done; echo 'Cockpit(5002) + VOX(5001) stopped.'

windows.command: $ports = @(5002,5001); foreach ($port in $ports) { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($p) { $p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Write-Host 'Cockpit(5002) + VOX(5001) stopped.'
